news.t: GraniteShares 2x Long MARA Daily ETF (MRAL) and GraniteShares 2x Long MRVL Daily ETF (MVLL) Launch Today

holdings.infoBox: MVLL is an equity ETF with a total of 18 individual holdings. The top holdings are Recv Long Mrvl Trs Cantor stock at 81.32%, Recv Long 2X Mrvl Marex at 80.77%, Recv Long 2x Mrvl Hsbc1 at 27.57%, Cash & Cash Equivalents at 15.32%, and Cash & Cash Equivalents at 14.83%.

overview.description: The GraniteShares 2x Long MRVL Daily ETF (MVLL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund provides 2x leveraged exposure, less fees and expenses, to the daily price movement for shares of Marvell Technology, Inc. (MRVL) stock. MVLL was launched on Mar 3, 2025 and is issued by GraniteShares.

data.title: GraniteShares 2x Long MARA Daily ETF (MRAL) and GraniteShares 2x Long MRVL Daily ETF (MVLL) Launch Today
data.text: New York, New York, March 07, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- GraniteShares, a leading provider of high-conviction exchange-traded funds (ETFs), is excited to announce the launch of two new leveraged ETFs: G...
